div.p: artifacts.tf + composed main.workload.tf — all resources exist after apply.
module workload_monitoring_lambda handler main.monitoring_handler no VPC · reads deployment package only
S3 ts-test-lambda-artifacts module lambda_deployment_artifacts SSE-S3, versioning, deny insecure transport
S3 ts-test-lambda-data module application_data_bucket KMS SSE, size/object alarms
ALB ts-writer-* module workload_writer_alb public, optional ACM HTTPS
Lambda test-reader module workload_reader_lambda handler main.reader_handler
Lambda test-writer module workload_writer_lambda handler main.writer_handler
Endpoints (interface + gateway) S3 gateway · SQS · CloudWatch Logs · X-Ray
